config.heading: PollBuddy Settings

config.repositoryTokenInfo: If you just created a new repository app, issue a new API token and enter it here.
config.allowNonAdminPollLabel: Allow non-admin users to create polls
config.allowNonAdminPollItem: Allow users without app management permission to create polls
